evidence_summary: The ticket contains the customer's name (Amit) and references a double charge and duplicate invoice amount on the customer's bank statement, indicating personal and payment-related information.
handling_recommendations: Verify the customer's identity and payment details before taking any action.
Request the invoice ID or registered account email to locate the transaction.
Do not promise a refund until verification is completed, per business rules.
Escalate the billing issue to the billing support team as required for premium customers.
Maintain a professional and empathetic tone while ensuring no sensitive data is exposed in communications.
